heading: Gang investigation coordination and information collection
label: 12532 Gang investigation coordination and information collection
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14062 of Title 42

children.heading: Coordination
children.label: a Coordination
children.text: The Attorney General (or the Attorney General’s designee), in consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury (or the Secretary’s designee), shall develop a national strategy to coordinate gang-related investigations by Federal law enforcement agencies.

children.heading: Data collection
children.label: b Data collection
children.text: The Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation shall acquire and collect information on incidents of gang violence for inclusion in an annual uniform crime report.

children.heading: Report
children.label: c Report
children.text: The Attorney General shall prepare a report on national gang violence outlining the strategy developed under subsection (a) to be submitted to the President and Congress by .January 1, 1996

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $1,000,000 for fiscal year 1996.
